_comment: Mutation of pensioner-with-dependents-mortgage-and-medical-expenses.json: mortgageInterestAmount and medicalExpenses are both > 0 (so mortgageInterestDocumentation and medicalExpenseDocumentation are both required via documents[].requiredWhen), but neither is provided in the documents[] array. A validator that only checks static required:true documents (certificazioneUnica2026, signatureDeclaration) and ignores documents[].requiredWhen would incorrectly accept this fixture -- exactly the 'documents[] blind spot' this fixture exists to catch.
